title: An Act providing an appropriation for the operating expenses of the Public Employees Relations Board and the Virgin Islands Labor Management Committee
text:
____
ACTNO.8 895
BILL NO. 35-0347
THIRTY-FIFTH LEGISLATURE OF THE VIRGIN ISLANDS
Regular Session
2024
An Act providing an appropriation for the operating expenses of the Public Employees
Relations Board for the fiscal year October 1, 2024, through September 30, 2025
-—0---
Be it enacted kv the Legislature ofthe Virgin Islands:
SECTION 1. Notwithstanding any other law to the contrary, there is appropriated from
the General Fund of the Treasury of the Government of the Virgin Islands the sum of
$1,686,909 to the Public Employees Relations Board for operating expenses for the fiscal year
October 1, 2024, through September 30, 2025
0100 GENERAL FUND FY2025
Public Employees Relations Board $ 1,686,909
TOTAL GENERAL FUND $ 1,686,909
Thus passed by the Legislature ofthe Virgin Islands on September 27, 2024.
Witness our Hands and Seal of the Legislature of the Virgin Islands this of
September, A.D., 2024.
E. Francis,
President
Secretary
r

Bill No. 35- 0347 is hereby approved.
Witness my hand and the Seal ofthe Government of
the United States Virgin Islands at Charlotte Amalie,
St. Thomas, This Itt day ofOctober, 2024 A.D.
Albert Bryan Jr.
Governor
